notes: Solid snake implementation with smooth interpolation, death animation, bonus items, speed levels, and demo AI on title screen; minor issue with drawBonus being called in both update and render causing double dt subtraction from bonusTimer, and the level-up logic has an off-by-one quirk, but overall very complete and polished.
An exceptionally polished, flawless implementation of Snake with smooth interpolation, input queuing, retro audio, a demo mode, and excellent visual feedback.

A solid and visually polished Snake build with working core mechanics, but bonus timing is improperly mutated during update via a render call, pause/countdown state handling is a bit rough, and overall game feel is competent rather than flawless.
